steps.title: Name the formation cause
steps.content: The student wants to identify what causes meanders. The relevant note says a meander forms when water erodes sediment from one side of a riverbank and redeposits it on the opposite side.

steps.title: Avoid related but wrong details
steps.content: B describes high sinuosity rather than what causes a meander. C describes how meanders later move. D gives an example of a river with many meanders. The cause is erosion and redeposition of sediment. The answer is A.
